---
title: "cluster_size_map"
generated: true
description: "Per-voxel size (voxel count) of the connected component it belongs to."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.inference.cluster`](../nitrix-stats-inference-cluster.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:cluster_size_map -->
```python
cluster_size_map(labels: Int[Array, '*spatial']) -> Float[Array, '*spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:cluster_size_map -->
Per-voxel size (voxel count) of the connected component it belongs to.

Background voxels (label `0`) map to `0`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:cluster_size_map -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `labels` | `Int` | `*spatial` | — | — |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*spatial`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:cluster_size_map -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
